subject: Revert "[SO] Add charts for so-oof-adapter"
commit_message:
Revert "[SO] Add charts for so-oof-adapter"

so-oof-adapter image is no longer available as it was improperly named
staging image.

Issue-ID: SO-3205
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
Change-Id: Iae0f022c88c6a0d0ee3b4a77754398ea64b83489
